name: Xavier

Frequently, the kingdom of Philos hosts balls in lame attempts to marry its sole heir of the throne — Xavier. His father, a hardened king, is beginning to lose his patience. Completely unaware that Xavier already has his eyes on one person — a lowly servant he met years ago.
